regulations.title: SEBI PFUTP Regulations, 2003
regulations.focus: Fraud, manipulation, wash trades, artificial volume
regulations.summary: The Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Fraudulent and Unfair Trade Practices relating to Securities Market) Regulations, 2003 target manipulative, deceptive, and unfair practices in the securities market.
regulations.check: Fence blocks actions that look like pump-and-dump activity, fake volume creation, circular trading, or other market manipulation.

regulations.title: SEBI PIT Regulations, 2015
regulations.focus: Insider trading and unpublished price sensitive information
regulations.summary: The SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 prohibit trading while in possession of unpublished price sensitive information and set controls around UPSI handling.
regulations.check: Fence blocks actions that rely on insider tips, unpublished price-sensitive information, or trading ahead of confidential announcements.

regulations.title: SEBI Investment Advisers Regulations, 2013
regulations.focus: Who can act as an investment adviser and how advice is delivered
regulations.summary: The SEBI (Investment Advisers) Regulations, 2013 require registration for investment advisers and establish conduct standards for advice provided to clients.
regulations.check: Fence flags actions that sound like regulated advice activity, especially where someone is presented as an adviser without the right compliance posture.

regulations.title: SEBI Research Analysts Regulations, 2014
regulations.focus: Research recommendations, disclosures, and analyst conduct
regulations.summary: The SEBI (Research Analysts) Regulations, 2014 regulate issuance of investment research reports and recommendations, including disclosure and conduct obligations.
regulations.check: Fence treats recommendation-style claims with extra caution, especially if they imply certainty, hidden conflicts, or unsupported return promises.

regulations.title: SEBI Portfolio Managers Regulations, 2020
regulations.focus: Managing securities portfolios on behalf of clients
regulations.summary: The SEBI (Portfolio Managers) Regulations, 2020 govern entities that manage securities portfolios for clients and require the proper registration and operating framework.
regulations.check: Fence blocks actions that imply managing or trading securities portfolios for other people without the appropriate regulatory setup.
